calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-01-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioner Meckfessel's petition to compel arbitration is OFF CALENDAR. A dismissal of the action was filed on May 21, 2018. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar May-04-2018 Continued To Jun-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Trenton Diehl, Esq. 209-334-5144 of Snider Diehl Sloup & Rasmussen, LLP for PETITIONER STEVEN MECKFESSEL through Court Call.
No Other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Petitioner reports parties have entered into a stipulation to continue the matter. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER STEVEN MECKFESSEL's Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration.

Continued to June 1, 2018 at 9:30 am per request of the moving party and approval of the Court. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano , CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)
